title: Partner
writer: Bernardo Bertolucci, Gianni Amico, Fyodor Dostoevsky
actors: Pierre Clémenti, Tina Aumont, Sergio Tofano
plot: Bernardo Bertolucci, along with co-scenarist Gianni Amico, used Dostoievski's 1846, pre-imprisonment novella The Double: A Petersburg Poem, which they moved to Italy and updated to the pro-Vietcong student-protest present.
